title: Figura ExtraFight
description: bridge that renders Figura avatars with EpicFight animation matrices.
body:
# Figura ExtraFight
Make your Figura avatar move with Epic Fight's animations — sword swings, skills, and attack poses now drive your
  Figura model directly.

 # ✨ Features
  - **Pose Sync**: Figura avatar follows every Epic Fight animation (head, body, arms, legs, hands, feet)
  - **Vanilla Part Hiding**: Calling `vanilla_model.<PART>:setVisible(false)` in your script hides Epic Fight model parts at once, including armor (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)
  - **No First-Person Overlap**: When a Figura avatar is loaded, Epic Fight's first-person model is automatically
  suppressed so it won't clip with your Figura hand
  - **ExtraBone Support**: Nested bone hierarchies (`Neck`, `LeftShoulder`, `Body → chest`, `LArmLower`, etc.) render at
   the correct positions without distortion
  - **Client-Side**: No server-side install required

# 📦 Requirements
-   EpicFight: Any version (If you are using version 20.9.7 or older, please use [0.0.41-epf-20.9.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura_extrafight/version/0.0.41-epf-20.9.7-forge+1.20.1)
- Minecraft: 1.20.1 (Forge)
- Figura: 0.1.5 or higher
- [Figura-Extrabone](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura_extrabone): 0.0.3 or higher (optional)
